title: CrashLoopBackOff in payments-api after v2.3.1 deploy
probable_root_cause: The v2.3.1 image introduced a missing STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variable reference. The application panicked on startup when the env var was not found. CrashLoopBackOff triggered after 3 failed restarts.
supporting_evidence: Logs: 'FATAL: required env var STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET not set'
Rollout event: payments-api image changed to v2.3.1 at 14:32 UTC
Alert: KubePodCrashLooping fired at 14:33 UTC (1 minute after deploy)
resolved_by: Added STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to deployment env via Kubernetes secret. Triggered rollout restart. Service recovered in 90 seconds.
